case_title: CRISWELL BENJAMIN VS LEE ROBERT DBA EMBOSSY REALTY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE ROBERT DBA EMBOSSY REALTY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CRISWELL BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT LEE ROBERT DBA EMBOSSY REALTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE ROBERT DBA EMBOSSY REALTY
